_publications._publicationTitle: Spectrophotometric and computational characterization of charge transfer complex of selumetinib with 2,3-dichloro-5,6-dicyano-1,4-benzoquinone and its utilization in developing an innovative green and high throughput microwell assay for analysis of bulk form and pharmaceutical formulation.

_contextSnippet: Under the proposed MW-SPA experimental conditions, minimum batch of 5 plates could be processed by a single analyst. Therefore, 2400 samples can be processed/hr (5 plates × 96 wells × 5 rounds/h)
details: Enabled high throughput analysis with capability to process 2400 samples per hour using 96-well plates with 5-minute reaction time
